name: Barker Inc
inc_date: 1963 (per D&B/Buzzfile; exact PA filing date unknown)
registry_source: Pennsylvania Department of State (not directly retrieved; PA SoS captcha-protected). Secondary sources: D&B/Buzzfile founding year 1963.
notes: Input address is 170 N State St, Dayton, PA 16222; SAFER record on file (USDOT 1723366) is registered to the Kittanning, PA satellite/HQ at 11670 State Route 85. Barker Inc serves the Armstrong School District and operates school buses out of multiple Armstrong County locations (Dayton and Kittanning). Power-units count of 2 on the FMCSA record is low and likely reflects intrastate registration only; D&B reports ~100 employees and ~$5.9M revenue. NOTE: Separate 'BARKER BUS COMPANY' at USDOT 803020 in Bridgewater, NJ (80 power units) is a DIFFERENT, unrelated NJ entity. PA Secretary of State entity details could not be retrieved directly (captcha).

name: Eshelman School Bus Svc
carrier_operation: Interstate; Authorized For Hire and Private (Property)
inc_date: unknown (operations trace to 1930s/1940s per company history; formal PA incorporation date not retrieved)
entity_status: active (per ongoing operations and FMCSA status)
registry_source: Pennsylvania Department of State (not directly retrieved; PA SoS captcha-protected). Company history sourced from eshelmantrans.com.
notes: Legal name on SAFER is ESHELMAN TRANSPORTATION INC; same physical address as the input (4339 Morgantown Rd, Mohnton, PA). Family-owned operator providing school bus service for 70+ years (Hamburg, Schuylkill Valley, Kutztown, Twin Valley, Lancaster Country Day) plus freight/trucking. PA SoS entity number/filing date not directly retrievable due to captcha; recommend follow-up via PA Bureau of Corporations (717-787-1057).

name: Fleetwood Community Bus Inc
inc_date: unknown (active PA entity per OpenCorporates with historical filings referenced as far back as 1945-1946; 501(c)(3) status effective 2020-01)

notes: No SAFER carrier snapshot located for 'Fleetwood Community Bus' (FMCSA keyword search returned no match). Entity is a Pennsylvania nonprofit/charitable organization (EIN 23-2666338) headquartered in Fleetwood, PA; 501(c)(3) effective January 2020 (Human Services - Transportation, Free or Subsidized). OpenCorporates record (PA entity) indicated for Fleetwood Community Bus at 203 E Main St, Fleetwood; the input address is 102 E Vine St which is consistent with Fleetwood, PA 19522. Likely a small/community-shuttle non-profit rather than a regulated motor carrier; no FMCSA registration confidently identified. Fleet size, drivers, and operating status from FMCSA cannot be confirmed.

name: Gotham Transportation
officers: Joseph Sabatelli (owner, per Manta; obituary indicates deceased)
entity_status: unknown (likely inactive/successor entity given owner's passing; NY DOS direct record not retrieved)
registry_source: New York Department of State Division of Corporations (not directly retrieved). Secondary: Manta, Bizapedia listings.
notes: No SAFER carrier snapshot was confidently identified for the Brooklyn-based Gotham Transportation Corp at 2847 W 21st St, Brooklyn, NY 11224. FMCSA keyword searches for GOTHAM, GOTHAM TRANS and GOTHAM TRANSPORTATION returned no matching passenger carriers in NY. Other Gotham entities (Gotham Transport Inc USDOT 3876408 in Manteca CA - freight; Gotham Brooklyn LLC USDOT 3390347; Gotham Bronx LLC USDOT 3386430; Gotham Logistics LLC USDOT 3497408) are NOT this company. Per Manta, Gotham Transportation Corp was established 2003 in NY, owner Joseph Sabatelli, ~$1-2.5M revenue, 20-49 employees, bus transportation category. The likely-related 'Gotham Bus Co Inc' (3167 Atlantic Ave, Brooklyn, DOS doc 1557561, filed 1991-06-25, CEO Joseph Sgro) is a DIFFERENT Brooklyn bus company. NY DOS direct entity lookup not completed.

name: Academy Express LLC
inc_date: 1968 (parent Academy Bus Lines founded by Frank A. Tedesco; Academy Express, LLC is a subsidiary brand/LLC of Academy Bus, LLC, formed later)
entity_status: active (operating subsidiary of Academy Bus, LLC)
registry_source: NJ Division of Revenue & Enterprise Services / NY Department of State foreign filing (not directly retrieved). Background per Wikipedia, BBB, federal records.
notes: FMCSA SAFER record matches Academy Express LLC. Note input address is 7 North St, Staten Island, NY 10302 - this is one of Academy's NY-area garage/terminal locations (they previously operated SIM23/SIM24 Staten Island commuter routes pre-2022). Carrier's principal/registered address on SAFER is the Hoboken, NJ HQ (111 Paterson Ave). Academy Express LLC is one of four operating companies under Academy Bus, LLC (with Academy Lines LLC, Airport Express LLC, No. 22 Hillside Corp). Charter/commuter/contract motor coach operator across the Northeast. Original Academy Bus Lines founded 1968.
